---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Use Case

Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the writing workflow you're trying to support.

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed feature or enhancement.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Other tools, community plugins, or workarounds?

## Additional Context

- Is this feature tied to a specific kind of writing (short fiction, novel, nonfiction, screenwriting, poetry, etc.)?
- Would this feature affect existing functionality or require changes to the data model?
- Any relevant screenshots, mockups, or examples from other writing tools (Longform, Scrivener, iA Writer, etc.)?

## Related Issues

Link any related issues, discussions, or prior feature requests.
